resources.string: Copy a video link, tap the floating button, save it to your phone.
Nothing downloaded yet. Your saved videos and audio show up here.

How to use:
1. Run the TapSave backend and put its address above.
2. Pick quality (or Audio only) — used for every download.
3. Grant the overlay permission and start the floating button.
4. In TikTok/Instagram/Pinterest, copy the video link (or Share to TapSave).
5. Tap the floating button — it shows progress, then saves to your Gallery (Movies/TapSave) or Music/TapSave.

For content you own or have permission to download.
